claims.summary: `projection_runtime_dir_from_parts` must remain stable when env/current_exe context varies.
claims.rationale: The `codec_projection` suite verifies env precedence, executable-relative fallback, missing/corrupt file recovery, stable kernel-derived epochs, and atomic tmp install behavior.

claims.summary: Tail/vibrancy smoothstep and raised tail ceilings must stay distinguishable from ordinary hard clipping.
claims.rationale: `codec_overflow_report` tests verify emotional clipping is reported, tail headroom remains separate, and no-overflow text stays quiet.

claims.summary: Any dynamic emotional ceiling or soft saturation would be a later live aperture change.
claims.rationale: Existing `codec_overflow_carriage_v1` retains `live_vector_write=false` and a default-off follow-up hook; no live delivery ceiling was changed.
